evidence.text: Danone’s approach to digital transformation goes beyond technology. By integrating digital transformation with a human-centric approach, the company is leveraging AI and data to enhance decision-making while maintaining its commitment to wellbeing, equity, and purpose. "Transforming the culture, building the capabilities and truly generating digital and a data savvy organization within Danone can only go through the Danone x Microsoft partnership". By launching initiatives such as the Danone Microsoft AI Academy, the organization intends to equip employees with the necessary skills and confidence to use new technologies and services.
